basic_details.job_title: NFSU Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Clerk & MTS Posts
basic_details.short_information: NFSU is recruiting 2 Administrative Staff posts on contractual basis for 12 months (extendable).

important_dates.venue: National Forensic Sciences University, Sector 9, Gandhinagar, Gujarat

age_limit.details: Age limit will be as per University norms for contractual positions. Exact upper age limit is not specified in the notification; candidates are advised to check original documents at the time of interview.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of walk-in interview. | Nationality: Indian Citizen only.

selection_process: Selection will be done through Walk-in Interview only. The University reserves the right to shortlist candidates based on screening or experience if a large number of applications are received. Final selection is subject to document verification and suitability.
how_to_apply: Candidates must appear directly for the walk-in interview on 24 July 2026 at 10:00 AM.
Venue: National Forensic Sciences University, Sector 9, Gandhinagar, Gujarat.
Bring one set of self-attested documents (degree, marksheets, experience certificates, etc.) along with original documents for verification.
No separate online application is required.
important_instructions: These are purely contractual/temporary positions for 12 months. No claim for regular absorption. Selected candidates must sign a Non-Disclosure Agreement. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. University reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process at any stage. Visit https://www.nfsu.ac.in/career regularly for updates.

content_sections.heading: NFSU Clerk & MTS Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: National Forensic Sciences University (NFSU), an Institute of National Importance, has released notification for engagement of Administrative Staff (Contractual) under the NFSU-State Tax Department, Uttarakhand Project (Uttarakhand Digital Forensic Lab Project). The notification contains full details on posts, qualifications, experience, walk-in schedule, and terms & conditions. Download NFSU Clerk and MTS Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NFSU Clerk & MTS Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: NFSU is recruiting 2 Administrative Staff posts on contractual basis for 12 months (extendable).

content_sections.heading: NFSU Clerk & MTS Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.date: National Forensic Sciences University, Sector 9, Gandhinagar, Gujarat

content_sections.heading: NFSU Clerk & MTS Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: A total of 02 contractual posts have been announced.

content_sections.heading: NFSU Clerk & MTS Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of walk-in interview. Nationality: Indian Citizen only.

rows.clerk: Degree from a recognised University + Working knowledge of computers

rows.multi_tasking_staff_mts: Adequate knowledge of Gujarati, English & Hindi

rows.clerk: Computer knowledge, Gujarati language, Administrative experience, Immediate joining

content_sections.heading: NFSU Clerk & MTS Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Age limit will be as per University norms for contractual positions. Exact upper age limit is not specified in the notification; candidates are advised to check original documents at the time of interview.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be done through Walk-in Interview only. The University reserves the right to shortlist candidates based on screening or experience if a large number of applications are received. Final selection is subject to document verification and suitability.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NFSU Clerk & MTS Recruitment 2026 (Walk-in)
content_sections.text: Candidates must appear directly for the walk-in interview on 24 July 2026 at 10:00 AM. Venue: National Forensic Sciences University, Sector 9, Gandhinagar, Gujarat. Bring one set of self-attested documents (degree, marksheets, experience certificates, etc.) along with original documents for verification. No separate online application is required. Documents Required at Interview: All educational certificates & marksheets Experience certificates (if any) Identity proof (Aadhaar, PAN, etc.) Recent passport-size photographs Self-attested photocopies

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for NFSU Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: These are purely contractual/temporary positions for 12 months. No claim for regular absorption. Selected candidates must sign a Non-Disclosure Agreement. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. University reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process at any stage. Visit https://www.nfsu.ac.in/career regularly for updates.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NFSU Clerk and MTS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no last date for online application. Candidates must appear for the Walk-in Interview on 24 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for NFSU Clerk post?
faq.answer: The consolidated monthly pay for Clerk is ₹30,000/-.

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required for MTS in NFSU Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Matriculation (10th) or equivalent with knowledge of Gujarati, English & Hindi.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age limit for NFSU Administrative Staff 2026?
faq.answer: Specific age limit is not mentioned in the notification. Candidates should carry relevant documents for verification.

faq.question: Q5. Where is the walk-in interview venue for NFSU Recruitment?
faq.answer: National Forensic Sciences University, Sector 9, Gandhinagar, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q6. Is this a permanent job in NFSU?
faq.answer: No. These are contractual positions for 12 months and may be extended after review.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required for NFSU Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, ID proof, and original documents for verification.
